message:
feat(policy): migrate inject_with_cx audit call to record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 135)

Fourteenth caller-migration tick. Target: `PolicyEngine::inject_with_cx`
line 6510 had one legacy storage call inside a fn advertising cx-first
semantics.

Migrated:
- storage.record_audit_action_redacted → record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx
  (sibling already exists from tick 117)

Legacy `inject` preserved unchanged — it has its own
record_audit_action_redacted call at line 6982 which correctly uses
the non-cx path since legacy `inject` does not take cx.

Verified via fork bypass: 456/456 policy:: and tantivy_policy::
tests pass.

Cumulative: 98 slices in ft-xbnl0.2.3 Cx-first sweep.

Caller-migration phase files now covered: reports, export,
diagnostic, search_explain, session_correlation, approval,
recorder_migration, session_restore, undo, workflows/runner (partial),
cleanup, secrets, tantivy_ingest, policy (partial).

Remaining scoped work: workflows/runner.rs handle_detection_with_cx →
handle_detection/run_workflow stack (10+ legacy sites, 300+ LOC)
would benefit from strangler-fig run_workflow_with_cx etc. — multi-tick.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
